headline: Netflix reportedly tried & failed to buy Roku, Western Digital is the new AI play
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré chat with Market Domination host Josh Lipton about why Western Digital (WDC) is becoming a major AI play; how the "Magnificent Seven" stocks may soon include Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and SpaceX (SPCX), and Netflix's (NFLX) reportedly failed bid to buy Roku (ROKU).

headline: Oil and US gas prices retreat on US-Iran ceasefire
summary: While US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed as investors continue to digest the Trump administration's reported peace deal with Iran, oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) have sunk below $80 per barrel but remain elevated above pre-war prices. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferré assess the impact these geopolitical headlines are having on oil and domestic US gas prices (RB=F).

The US 10 year Treasury yield is around 4.43% to 4.50%, which signals cheaper borrowing costs for mortgages, credit cards, and companies.
